title: Mining Cool Down Fix [Forge]
description: Removes Minecraft's minimum delay between breaking blocks
body:
A forge version of Covenant\_Turtle's [Mining Cool Down Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-cooldown-fix)
 

By default, the Minecraft client has a hard-coded delay of (5 ticks) between break a block and starting to break another, unless your total mining speed would allow you insta-mine it, as per the following wiki article: [[https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Breaking#Instant\_breaking](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Breaking#Instant%5C_breaking)](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Breaking#Instant%5C_breaking)

This mod simply sets that delay to 0, allowing you to break multiple blocks much faster than before, without affecting the time it takes to break a single block.

However, it is handled this way in vanilla to avoid accidentally mining too many blocks if your mining speed is high enough. This mod also introduces a new enchantment that limits your mining speed to (1 + level) ticks.
